How BANCHAN Works

•📌 How to Order BANCHAN

1. Select Banchan: Choose from our authentic Korean dishes made with 100% Kosher ingredients.
2. Choose Pickup: Pick your preferred Jerusalem location, date, and convenient time slot.
3. Collect & Pay: Meet our delivery vehicle and pay on pickup via Cash, Bit, Paybox, or Card.

•1. How do I place an order?

Browse the menu, add your favorite Korean dishes to the basket, click checkout, and fill in your name, email address, and preferred pickup location.

•2. What is the reservation schedule?

Our deliveries occur every Tuesday and Friday. Please order at least 2 days in advance.

•3. How does payment work?

No prepayment is required on this website. It acts as a reservation booking. You can pay cash (ILS) directly to our chef upon pickup, or send a Bit/Bank transfer before collection.

•4. What if I am late to the pickup point?

Please call our support line to coordinate alternative hand-off locations along our route.

BANCHAN Jerusalem Support · +972 50-123-4567
